title: 道は見えた！進め☆私のラッキーロード

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay, well, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Let's see, the next tryout race is... Oh, look, it's Copano Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
She ran on turf last time, but today she's running on dirt. I wonder if
she's cut out for it.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Rickey, what's this about? Why are you suddenly taking on a dirt
race?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me. You've come to sell me on feng shui, even on the
track?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Not this time! A trainer helped me decide, is all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We realized that dirt might suit me better, considering my running
form and build. But most importantly...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think that dirt might be more compatible with feng shui! I won't
know until I try racing on it though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
There you go with the feng shui again... Rickey, don't underestimate
the dirt. It takes steady effort day after day to run these races.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
You can't rely on silly superstitions. You've gotta work really hard, as
if you're plow'n the earth in the depths of a Hokkaido winter, or you'll
get nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I know. I really have been putting in the work. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: As long as I can hear the earth's voice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey enters the starting gate with a look of concentration
on her face. Soon after, the fateful race begins.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Yes! I'm off to a great start! The bracket color is harmonious with my
direction. And the dirt feels...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Yup, it feels good! When I run with everything I've got, the track's
condition is plain for me to read!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(But that's not the main thing. The big question is whether or not I'll
be able to hear the earth's voice.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I can't run an auspicious race unless I feel the qi flowing. So please...
Please!)

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
(I've gotta position myself closer to the outside! And make sure I
don't get covered in sand!)

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
(I can't get a good grip on the track today... I've got to regulate my
breathing and preserve my stamina.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I can see it... I can feel it... The flow of qi! The earth's voice is telling
me what's happening on the track!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(That trainer was right. I should've known—feng shui and dirt go hand
in hand!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Look at Rickey... She's so much livelier than last time... Trainer, what
happened?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you talking about the sand on the dirt track?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey told me that feng shui isn't a superstition, but a study
of the environment. If that's the case, then it's about knowing where
you're situated and understanding your surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sand conveys that perfectly. The gravel on the training grounds, the
sand on the beach, and the sand on the dirt track all show the flow of
qi.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Leave it to me, Trainer! Where should I position myself? Dui, zhen,
gen... Right, it's zhen! I'll be able to run more freely if I get out to the
east where the qi is weaker.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(This is just like the generative cycle! Wood gives birth to fire, and
fire returns to earth! So I need to make my move after I pass that big
tree.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The final straight! The landform and the compass are aligned. Luck is
on my side. From here on...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The fastest racer wins! Now to direct all the effort I've put in toward
the lucky direction! YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: She surged ahead of everyone?! H-how is she doing this?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, her running's completely different from last time! What's
gotten into her?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. She's always been capable of this. When she's able to make
the necessary preparations, she can see the flow of qi that guides her
to victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The tryout race ends...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer. I ran amazingly thanks to you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to figure out why I couldn't hear the earth's voice
because you believed in both me and feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And as you know, I want to share the wonderful power of feng shui
with everyone and help make the world a happier place!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, will you help me? As my trainer, I mean! You wouldn't turn me
down again, would you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! It's rare to find someone like you—someone who fully
believes in feng shui and wants to make the world happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Together we make a generative cycle! I'm so happy I was lucky
enough to meet you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hrm-mhm... I never imagined the day you'd run on dirt. But after
seeing you in action...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'm more worried about facing your running than your feng shui! You
still won't beat me, though!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Why yes, I have to agree. I'll have to get serious when we're playing
together.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae! Acute! I'm so excited to run with you two! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Just you wait, I'm gonna make both of you happy with feng shui! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The formidable rivals stand at the doorway to the dirt tour. And so
begins Copano Rickey's journey to spread happiness!
